boxDescription:
The power distribution box is located in the engine compartment. It has high-current fuses that protect your vehicle's main electrical systems from overloads.
If you disconnect and reconnect the battery, you will need to reset some features

boxDescription:
The fuse panel is in the right-hand side of the passenger footwell behind a trim panel. To remove the trim panel, pull it toward you and swing it away from the side. To reinstall it, line up the tabs with the grooves on the panel, and then push it shut.
To remove the fuse panel cover, press in the tabs on both sides of the cover, and then pull it off. To reinstall the fuse panel cover, place the top part of the cover on the fuse panel and push the bottom part until it latches. Gently pull on the cover to make sure it has
latched properly.
